mapper.select: /* inetInfoMapper.selectInetInfoList */ SELECT A.INET_INFO_SEQ ,A.FILE_NM ,A.CUST_NM ,A.BIRTH_DT ,A.GENDER ,A.CTN ,A.SVC_CNTR_ID ,A.PROD_CD ,A.PROD_NM ,A.STATUS ,A.REG_DT ,A.OPEN_DT ,A.CAN_DT ,A.REG_TYPE ,A.INTERNET_ID ,A.COMB_YN ,A.CUST_ID ,A.REG_DTTM FROM MDS_INET_INFO A LEFT OUTER JOIN MSP_INET_INFO_HIST B ON A.INET_INFO_SEQ = B.INET_INFO_SEQ WHERE B.INET_INFO_SEQ IS NULL AND A.PROC_YN = 'N' ORDER BY A.INET_INFO_SEQ ASC
mapper.insert: /* inetInfoMapper.updateInetInfoMst */ MERGE INTO MSP_INET_INFO_MST A USING ( SELECT A.CUST_NM ,A.BIRTH_DT ,A.GENDER ,A.CTN ,A.SVC_CNTR_ID ,A.PROD_CD ,A.PROD_NM ,A.STATUS ,A.REG_DT ,A.OPEN_DT ,A.CAN_DT ,A.REG_TYPE ,A.INTERNET_ID ,A.COMB_YN ,A.CUST_ID FROM MDS_INET_INFO A WHERE A.INET_INFO_SEQ = #{inetInfoSeq} ) B ON (A.SVC_CNTR_ID = B.SVC_CNTR_ID) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET A.CUST_NM = B.CUST_NM ,A.BIRTH_DT = B.BIRTH_DT ,A.GENDER = B.GENDER ,A.CTN = B.CTN ,A.PROD_CD = B.PROD_CD ,A.PROD_NM = B.PROD_NM ,A.STATUS = B.STATUS ,A.REG_DT = B.REG_DT ,A.OPEN_DT = B.OPEN_DT ,A.CAN_DT = B.CAN_DT ,A.REG_TYPE = B.REG_TYPE ,A.INTERNET_ID = B.INTERNET_ID ,A.COMB_YN = B.COMB_YN ,A.CUST_ID = B.CUST_ID ,A.RVISN_ID = 'BATCH' ,A.RVISN_DTTM = SYSDATE WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( A.CUST_NM ,A.BIRTH_DT ,A.GENDER ,A.CTN ,A.SVC_CNTR_ID ,A.PROD_CD ,A.PROD_NM ,A.STATUS ,A.REG_DT ,A.OPEN_DT ,A.CAN_DT ,A.REG_TYPE ,A.INTERNET_ID ,A.COMB_YN ,A.CUST_ID ,A.REGST_ID ,A.REGST_DTTM ) VALUES ( B.CUST_NM ,B.BIRTH_DT ,B.GENDER ,B.CTN ,B.SVC_CNTR_ID ,B.PROD_CD ,B.PROD_NM ,B.STATUS ,B.REG_DT ,B.OPEN_DT ,B.CAN_DT ,B.REG_TYPE ,B.INTERNET_ID ,B.COMB_YN ,B.CUST_ID ,'BATCH' ,SYSDATE )

/* inetInfoMapper.InsertInetInfoHist */ INSERT INTO MSP_INET_INFO_HIST ( INET_INFO_SEQ ,CUST_NM ,BIRTH_DT ,GENDER ,CTN ,SVC_CNTR_ID ,PROD_CD ,PROD_NM ,STATUS ,REG_DT ,OPEN_DT ,CAN_DT ,REG_TYPE ,INTERNET_ID ,COMB_YN ,CUST_ID ,REGST_ID ,REGST_DTTM ) SELECT A.INET_INFO_SEQ ,A.CUST_NM ,A.BIRTH_DT ,A.GENDER ,A.CTN ,A.SVC_CNTR_ID ,A.PROD_CD ,A.PROD_NM ,A.STATUS ,A.REG_DT ,A.OPEN_DT ,A.CAN_DT ,A.REG_TYPE ,A.INTERNET_ID ,A.COMB_YN ,A.CUST_ID ,'BATCH' ,SYSDATE FROM MDS_INET_INFO A WHERE A.INET_INFO_SEQ = #{inetInfoSeq}
